nasb.text: Then I proclaimed a fast there at the river of Ahava, that we might humble ourselves before our God to seek from Him a safe journey for us, our little ones, and all our possessions.

esv.text: Then I proclaimed a fast there, at the river Ahava, that we might humble ourselves before our God, to seek from him a safe journey for ourselves, our children, and all our goods.

cnv.text: “那時，我在亞哈瓦河邊那裡宣告禁食，為要在我們的　神面前謙卑下來，為自己和我們的孩子，以及我們所有的財物尋求　神指示一條暢通的道路。

ccb.text: 然后，我在亚哈瓦河边宣布禁食，为要在我们的上帝面前谦卑下来，祈求祂保护我们、我们的儿女及财物一路平安。
